test_suite.details: All 3679 tests pass. Covers schema, HTML output consistency, internal links, build pipeline, data cross-references, sections.json schema, prose content integrity, prediction panels, Phase A design refresh, PROP-041 Phase 2 smoke.

internal_anchors.details: test.js Section 3 covers all href='#...' targets and showTab() calls. Passed with 0 failures. sectionNav helper not detected in current HTML (may use alternate nav pattern); no orphaned tabs found by tab structure check.

tab_structure.details: Tab structure validated by test suite. sectionNav calls: 0 (site uses alternate navigation). No broken nav chain detected.

external_links.details: 13 priority data-source links checked (NOAA, ESA, INTERMAGNET, JPL, BGS, NCEI, dome site, our site, GitHub). All reachable. Two redirect_changed: intermagnet.github.io moved to intermagnet.org (permanent move, links still work); GRACE L1A dataset URL moved to cloud-datasets path on PO.DAAC. No DOI/publisher links checked per policy.

data_prose_consistency.details: Covered by test suite Section 2 (HTML Output Consistency) and Section 5 (Data Cross-References). 0 failures. wins.json has 72 entries (001-070 plus 057b and 058b). Build reproducibility confirms HTML matches source data exactly.

win_detail_consistency.details: Covered by test suite. All WIN TLDRs present (tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict fields). 0 missing TLDR fields. 27 genuinely prospective predictions checked — all have tldr field. 0 progressive disclosure violations in ps-tldr elements (122 total, 0 empty).

win_dome_alignment.details: Dome site (john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html) shows 69 WINs (WIN-001 through WIN-069). Our review covers 72 entries (001-070 plus 057b, 058b). WIN-070 is our analyst-added claim per generate-html.js caption ('1 analyst-added claim (WIN-070)'). No dome WINs missing from our review. No unexpected WIN number collisions or title drift detected.

progressive_disclosure.details: All 122 ps-tldr elements have content. All WINs have tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict. All 27 genuinely prospective predictions have tldr.

hardcoded_theme_colors.details: No hardcoded light-theme colors (#fff, #ffffff, #f8f9fa, etc.) found in sections.json inline styles.

discoverability_infrastructure.uncounted_failures_json: ok — 18 entries, 0 dup IDs, all required fields present
discoverability_infrastructure.meta_tags: ok — description, og:title, og:description, ClaimReview all present
discoverability_infrastructure.details: All discoverability files present and valid. uncounted-failures.json uses nested object schema with 'entries' array (18 entries, schema valid). Meta tags complete.

expansion_tracker.id_continuity: 93 genuinely untracked IDs across 12 gap ranges (tracked under ISS-2105)
expansion_tracker.details: next_id=426 > max_id=425 — correct (ISS-2096 resolved). 0 orphaned output files (ISS-2099 resolved). Live-archive disjoint (live=3, archive=389). 0 stale pending items. 1 live-state predicate violation: EXP-424 has integrated=true and status=complete but remains in live items[] — should have been moved to archive. 93 untracked EXP IDs (ISS-2105, count increased from 86 to 93 since last report).

curmudgeon_digest_coverage.details: 1 unprocessed review — within normal pipeline lag (decider runs since last curmudgeon output). No systematic filter gap detected.

curmudgeon_parse_errors.details: Digest regenerated fresh. 0 parse errors in review files.

drift_audit.details: Drift audit refreshed. 13 candidates for curmudgeon re-review: 9 large rewrites and 4 TLDR-only changes. 27 pre-TLDR schema items. 0 verdict-changed items.

workspace_only_files.details: Checked via fresh git clone (depth=1, blob:none filter). All 578 curmudgeon reviews, 515 analyst expansions, and 10 analyst JSON files are committed to git. ISS-2099 confirmed resolved.

build_reproducibility.details: node build.js html output is byte-for-byte identical to current docs/index.html. ISS-2095 (critical build drift from 2026-05-16) confirmed resolved — a subsequent rebuild has synced the published HTML to source data.

issues_found.description: EXP-424 has integrated=true and status=complete but remains in live items[] of expansion-tracker.json — the live→archive move was not completed after integration.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Move EXP-424 entry from items[] to expansion-tracker-archive.jsonl. Append the JSON line to archive, then remove the item from items[]. Guard with if(d.integrated===true) before archiving.

issues_found.description: 93 genuinely untracked EXP IDs across 12 gap ranges (EXP-52, EXP-300, EXP-302 through EXP-316, EXP-319 through EXP-321, EXP-324 through EXP-348, EXP-350 through EXP-376, EXP-378 through EXP-383, EXP-389 through EXP-390, EXP-399 through EXP-406, EXP-408 through EXP-414). Count increased from 86 to 93 since ISS-2105 was filed.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Investigate the 7 new IDs not tracked when ISS-2105 was filed. Most gaps are likely from cancelled/subsumed expansions whose tracker entries were deleted rather than updated to terminal status. The fix is to never delete tracker entries — only set status to cancelled/superseded/subsumed and archive them.

issues_found.description: intermagnet.github.io has permanently moved to intermagnet.org — redirect_changed. HTML links to https://intermagnet.github.io/ still resolve via redirect but should be updated.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Update all instances of https://intermagnet.github.io/ to https://intermagnet.org/ in docs/index.html (via sections.json rebuild).

issues_found.description: PO.DAAC GRACE L1A dataset URL redirected from /dataset/GRACE_L1A_GRAV_JPL_RL03 to /cloud-datasets?search=GRACE_L1A_GRAV_JPL_RL03 — dataset moved to cloud archive.

summary: Overall status: WARN. All 3679 test suite tests pass. Build is reproducible (ISS-2095 resolved). Five previously open major/critical issues confirmed resolved (ISS-2095 build drift, ISS-2096 next_id collision, ISS-2098 EXP-395-398 orphans, ISS-2099 workspace-only files, ISS-2101 baby-orphan-ISS items). New finding: EXP-424 stuck in live tracker with integrated=true (moderate, new — should be archived). ISS-2105 (EXP ID gaps) remains open with count slightly increased to 93 from 86. Two minor external link redirects: intermagnet.github.io → intermagnet.org, GRACE L1A dataset URL → cloud-datasets path. Drift audit refreshed: 13 candidates (9 large rewrites, 4 TLDR-only). Discoverability infrastructure, hardcoded theme colors, curmudgeon digest coverage, and workspace-sync all clean.
